node.text:
"Winter is coming" ❄️ So I went out for some shopping and was extremely excited to see that Charcoal is offering gift vouchers on shopping so I thought to avail this amazing offer.😀
For the celebrations of 16th Anniversary, Charcoal is giving two gift vouchers:  Rs 4,000 voucher on the shopping Rs 40,000 and a voucher of Rs. 6,000 on the shopping of Rs 60,000/- 🛍️
You can get this voucher whether you shop online or in store. The Voucher can be redeemed in the month of November on Full Priced Items only.
Happy Shopping!
@body.worksbycrl

🎥: @tomkharoos 

#Charcoal #AnniversarySale
Charcoal belike: baray Bhai ka budget ni chotay se kaam chalaen gy😂😂
Bt bs itni c he k larky ny sary style kr diye hain 1 hi look mein
Charcoal ny sbko ek hi script dia hua hai. Kuch to change krlo tum log

node.text:
MENTAL DISORDER IS NOT A FASHION ⬇️

(Idea credits: @eemaanasif) 🫡🧠

Often times I have seen these huge celebrities labelling certain disorders like PCOS, OCD, ADHD, etc onto themselves without ANY basis or proper diagnosis. The reason is understandable. More talking points in media and PR. They have made a trend out of mental illnesses. 

ADHD is a serious problem. Those who have it especially children it is very evident from observation. Manifestations in adults is different. There are different types. Attention Deficit type. Hyperactive type. or Mixed. 

Lastly, stop labelling disorders onto yourself. It can only be concluded with proper diagnosis and analysis of symptoms
Apna clinical psychology kaha sa ki?
Last reaction was best! "Class mein zone out hojati hun" bus verbal "huh" ki kami thi 😂

This is the same thing with ocd. I have been diagnosed of ocd by several psychiatrists and seeing everyone just joking about it, casually saying they have ocd makes my blood boil. Here I am questioning my entire existence, fighting eveyday to be alive the next day and all i hear is "I hAvE oCd tOO" while they are chilling. LOL
@notinuse8848 11 year old me and the current 17 year old me wants to 🔪 such people 🥰
Alia bhai hai vo , agar vo kahe sooraj pashchim se ugta hai toh vo bhi maan lunga

node.text:
PakWheels is bringing its Lahore Auto Show to the Expo Center for the second time! Join us on 20th Oct 2024 from 12 PM to 8 PM with your family and friends to experience the best of Lahore's car culture. See you there!

Book your tickets from @bookmepk to avail a 40% discount.

node.text:
What living with ANXIETY feels like...

Does this problem occur with you?
Kiya anxiety ko medicines Kay baghair theak Kiya jaa sakta hai ?
Relate kr rhi hon mai sb symptoms hy 🤦🏾‍♀️pagl ho jana hy mainy
Zia bhai its 23 weaks so plz make video for solutions

How to overcome this?Im really concerned i feel this almost everyday.Also i feel like im happy but deep down something or someone is telling me that im not happy my heart isn’t happy💔And then i start being guilty that Allah has given me everything,a good lifestyle,supporting and loving family,Good academics,Almost everything why Am i being ungrateful😭
I'v been through this in my competitive exams journey

@_ihadiya_ I really think that would I even find my love in this life, it makes me think about it just because of social anxiety and it becomes even more and more bad when people know what you suffer from

@ziazulfii brother make itt. I even think if I'm eligible to join the army of Mehdi or not? Many many thoughts come in mind and sometimes while job, just want to go to a silent peaceful place where there are no humans(in mountains, waterfalls)

node.text: Agar mbbs na ho to kia kary

📢 `ATTENTION UHS & SZABMU ASPIRANTS!`
The moment of unity has arrived. 💪
On November 5, 2025, UHS students at UHS, Lahore and SZABMU students at SZABMU, Islamabad will collectively submit the official application regarding the correction of key errors, sharp at 11:00 AM.
Instead of scattered efforts, let us rise together as one voice, one purpose, one cause.
When we unite with discipline and determination, Insha’Allah, we will make a difference — even before the legal process begins. 🌿
Our leaders will guide you with the next steps after submission to the respective conducting universities.
You are also encouraged to bring your parents along for support.
This is not just a call —
✨ It’s the time for rightful action, for truth, and for your future. ✨

Bro jo log ni ho ske pass wo russia me ya tehran medical university or degar zahedan medical university b he ap os me admission le skte he bugdet affordable he bki jis ka wha ni hoa wo iran jai best best option ❤️

node.text:
It was a huge honor and a personal achievement for me to appear as a guest speaker at @lifeatlums Orientation event and a massive thank you to @riayat_lums for making it possible for me. 

We had a healthy interactive session on urban planning and how we, as civilians, can make cities more walkable and suited to pedestrians. Meanwhile, we discussed thoroughly on how we can improve our mental health by adapting a healthy lifestyle and environment. 

Nevertheless, this is a place I would love to come back to.
Plz Ik Ans de den ib ma plz
Omg really … I’m proud of you ❤️🙌

node.text:
Read Caption for details ⬇️

Schizophrenia is a complex mental health disorder where people experience a different reality than others. It can make someone see, hear, or feel things that aren’t actually there, or believe things that don’t make sense to others. These experiences can be confusing and overwhelming, as the line between real and imagined becomes blurred.

There are different types of schizophrenia that affect people in various ways:

Paranoid Schizophrenia – This is the most common type, where people have strong beliefs that others are plotting against them or want to harm them, along with hearing voices.

Disorganized Schizophrenia – Here, a person’s thoughts and speech become jumbled, making it hard for them to communicate clearly. Their behavior may also become unpredictable.

Catatonic Schizophrenia – In this rare form, a person might stop moving or speaking for long periods or, in contrast, may move in unusual ways.

Undifferentiated Schizophrenia – This type includes symptoms from multiple forms, making it hard to categorize under just one type.

Schizophrenia is more than just hearing voices or having strange thoughts—it’s a lifelong condition that requires understanding and support. With the right help, people living with schizophrenia can still lead meaningful lives.

node.text:
Thank you Arshad! ❤️🇵🇰 The entire nation was deprived of this feeling for decades. And with one throw, you made history, inspired millions and given us a joy of a lifetime. 🏅🇵🇰
.
You are the best thing that has happened to our sporting industry in a long time. And this is a wake up call for the state to start taking athletics and other sports seriously!

کاش اتنی اہمیت ہمارے ملک کو نیوکلیئر پاور بنانے والے ڈاکٹر عبد القدیر خان کو دی جاتی جس نے ہماری نسلوں پر احسان کیا  لیکن غلام میڈیا امریکہ کی ناراضگی کہا مول لے سکتا اور ضیاء بھائی آپسے بھی امید ہے ڈاکٹر صاحب کے لیے بھی ایک ویڈیو بنائے گئے ❤️
Ha hame pata hai sir kitna support kiya pakistan ne unhe. But sir aapka content aacha hai
Zia bro one of ur biggest fan here dark web pr video bnayen plzzz👏🙌
zia bhi follow kr do pls big fan😢

node.text:
Need to match your work out with protein diet? @nutrabox.pk got you!
.
A fully customised meal plan tailored to your dietary needs. From muscle gain packages to weight loss to Keto meals, they've got you covered. Be sure to check them out!
My experience with nutrabox is great so far😍😍😍
This pages isn’t for weight gain?

node.text:
READ CAPTION 👇🏽

Here are 5 reasons you feel depressed all the time:

HIGH SUGAR INTAKE:
Bad news for 'Meetha' lovers. Overconsumption of sugar triggers imbalances in certain brain chemicals, especially when consumed in high amounts in the morning. These imbalances can lead to depression and may even increase the long-term risk of developing a mental health disorder in some people.

POOR SLEEPING ROUTINE:
Scrolling through reels late at night won't do you any good. Poor sleep may create difficulties regulating emotions that, in turn, may leave you more vulnerable to depression in the future — months or even years from now. And depression itself is associated with sleep difficulties such as shortening the amount of restorative slow wave sleep a person gets each night. 

PHYSICAL INACTIVITY:
This is the real pandemic. By not moving your body, you're limiting the oxygen supply to your brain and also preventing the natural release of Endorphins which are feel good chemicals of your body. Exercising keeps the brain active and is also correlated to having better sleep. 

SOCIAL ISOLATION:
Humans are social animals and we are meant to socialise and interact with others. And no! I'm not talking about social media. We must take our time out to interact with friends and family, to share our lives with others. Social disconnection leads to not only depression but also heart problems and reduced life expectancy. 

SMOKING: 
Smoking will give you a temporary feeling of sedation but will ultimately make you depressed in the long term. Smoking is a behavior that increases the risk of depression. The higher the smoking frequency and smoking volume, the higher the risk of depression, whereas smoking cessation is associated with decreased risk of depression, and the longer the smoking cessation duration, the lower the risk of depression.
